description: Composition Pink and white printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neck with short sleeves and ethnic floral print, short buttoned placket, pink piping with sequins on the neck, empire waist, sleeves with piping and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This elegant kurti from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The traditional print coupled with its pretty piping is sure to make it a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
